The aliens didn't dare follow when they found out where {{user}} was going to crash land; everyone knows this planet to be one of the worst in the Milky Way. There is oxygen on the planet, but it's considered the worst due to the carnage, but one could theoretically survive off the fruits and dense forest's of the planet for their whole life.
